iflytek/astron-rpa ·GitHub ⭐ 6769 Java · RPA, iFlytek, Automation, Enterprise, Python, Low-Code, Open-Source

What it is

AstronRPA is an enterprise-grade, open-source RPA platform by iFlytek with 300+ pre-built components covering GUI, browser, Excel, PDF, vision, email, and API automation. It features a visual designer, bi-directional AI agent integration (Astron Agent), MCP services, and Docker-based server deployment.

Problems solved

  • Provides a comprehensive
  • open-source alternative to commercial RPA tools (like UIPath
  • Automation Anywhere) that integrates natively with AI agent workflows
  • enabling both no-code automation for business users and extensible component development for engineers.

How to get started

Server: docker compose up -d in the docker/ directory. Client: Download the Release binary or build with build.bat --python-exe [path]. Configure resources/conf.yaml to point to your server. Use the visual designer to build workflows by drag-and-drop of 300+ component atoms.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

iflytek/astron-rpa is positioned as a astronrpa is an enterprise-grade, open-source rpa platform by iflytek with 300+ pre-built components covering gui, browser, excel, pdf, vision, email, and api automation. it features a visual designer, bi-directional ai agent integration (astron agent), mcp services, and docker-based server deployment. It aims to provide developers with a robust, Java-based solution for agent-ready rpa suite with out-of-the-box automation tools. built for individuals and enterprises.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Provides a comprehensive. iflytek/astron-rpa addresses this by astronrpa is an enterprise-grade, open-source rpa platform by iflytek with 300+ pre-built components covering gui, browser, excel, pdf, vision, email, and api automation. it features a visual designer, bi-directional ai agent integration (astron agent), mcp services, and docker-based server deployment, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using Java, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

4. Core Implementation

Main logic revolves around agent-ready rpa suite with out-of-the-box automation tools. built for individuals and enterprises. The implementation utilizes Java's strengths to provide astronrpa is an enterprise-grade, open-source rpa platform by iflytek with 300+ pre-built components covering gui, browser, excel, pdf, vision, email, and api automation. it features a visual designer, bi-directional ai agent integration (astron agent), mcp services, and docker-based server deployment, ensuring high reliability and performance under load.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, server: docker compose up -d in the docker/ directory. client: download the release binary or build with build.bat --python-exe [path]. configure resources/conf.yaml to point to your server. use the visual designer to build workflows by drag-and-drop of 300+ component atoms. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, Java-powered utility that streamlines agent-ready rpa suite with out-of-the-box automation tools. built for individuals and enterprises; it effectively tackles Provides a comprehensive while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
